description: Open the retail sales spreadsheet (sales_report.xlsx) in Excel from the Desktop\ExcelTasks folder. This sheet contains real US monthly retail sales for Clothing and Clothing Accessories Stores (FRED series MRTSSM448USS), with values in **millions of dollars**. Apply conditional formatting to the 'Revenue' column (column E): cells with values greater than 10000 should have a green fill background, and cells with values less than 5000 should have a red fill background. Save the file using Ctrl+S.
